calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up Against Defts
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.

Dana Andreoli, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TRADER VIC'S.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) STELLA FILMUS, SVETLANA PORYES.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Kier Fullmer sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $203,161.39
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,308.38
Attorney's Fees: $74,735.00
Costs: $6,491.56
Total Judgment in the amount of $300,696.33
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-31-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
